country_result:
Country: Ukraine
Coordinates: 48.46, 35.04
City: Rural area
Continent: Europe
final_reasoning: The image shows a rural road with characteristics common to Eastern Europe. Key indicators include the style of the utility poles, the white-painted lower trunks of the trees (a common practice in post-Soviet countries for pest control and visibility), and the presence of large plastic greenhouses (poly-tunnels) on the right. The architecture of the distant houses is modest and typical of rural villages in the region. The road is a simple two-lane asphalt road without markings. The vegetation consists of deciduous trees and wild grasses typical of a temperate continental climate. Based on the visual cues and the general landscape, this is consistent with rural Ukraine.
